ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "county_population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "county_area" REAL /* Area of the county in square miles */,
  "county_health_department_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the county health department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_years" (
  "school_year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school year */,
  "year_start" TEXT /* Start year of the school year */,
  "year_end" TEXT /* End year of the school year */,
  "school_year_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the school year */,
  "school_year_status" TEXT /* Status of the school year (e.g., active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., health official, school administrator, researcher) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccines" (
  "vaccine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccine */,
  "vaccine_name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccine */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vaccine */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the vaccine */,
  "doses_required" INTEGER /* Number of doses required */,
  "recommended_age_group" TEXT /* Recommended age group for the vaccine */,
  "side_effects" TEXT /* Common side effects of the vaccine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exemption_types" (
  "exemption_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exemption type */,
  "exemption_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the exemption type (e.g., medical, personal, religious) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the exemption type */,
  "legal_requirements" TEXT /* Legal requirements for the exemption */,
  "approval_process" TEXT /* Approval process for the exemption */,
  "validity_period" TEXT /* Validity period of the exemption */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exemption_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance report */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "school_year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school year */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the compliance report */,
  "report_creator" TEXT /* Creator of the report */,
  "report_approver" TEXT /* Approver of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_reports_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_reports_school_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_year_id") REFERENCES school_years ("school_year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "school_year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school year */,
  "intervention_date" TEXT /* Date the intervention was planned or executed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the intervention */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the intervention (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  "intervention_cost" REAL /* Cost of the intervention */,
  "expected_impact" TEXT /* Expected impact of the intervention */,
  "actual_impact" TEXT /* Actual impact of the intervention */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_method" TEXT /* Method of evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interventions_school_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_year_id") REFERENCES school_years ("school_year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interventions_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "anomalies" (
  "anomaly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each anomaly */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry where the anomaly was detected */,
  "anomaly_date" TEXT /* Date the anomaly was detected */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the anomaly */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the anomaly (e.g., open, resolved) */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the anomaly was resolved */,
  "detected_by" TEXT /* User who detected the anomaly */,
  "detected_method" TEXT /* Method of detection (e.g., automated, manual) */,
  "anomaly_type" TEXT /* Type of the anomaly (e.g., data entry error, system issue) */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the resolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anomaly_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "public_health_initiatives" (
  "initiative_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each initiative */,
  "initiative_name" TEXT /* Name of the initiative */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the initiative */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the initiative */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the initiative */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget for the initiative */,
  "funding_sources" TEXT /* Sources of funding */,
  "partners" TEXT /* Partners involved in the initiative */,
  "impact_metrics" TEXT /* Metrics to measure the impact of the initiative */,
  "evaluation_reports" TEXT /* Evaluation reports of the initiative */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("initiative_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "initiative_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant entry */,
  "initiative_id" INTEGER /* ID of the initiative */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county */,
  "participation_status" TEXT /* Participation status (e.g., confirmed, pending, declined) */,
  "participation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for participation */,
  "expected_outcome" TEXT /* Expected outcome of the participation */,
  "actual_outcome" TEXT /* Actual outcome of the participation */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from the participation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_initiative_participants_initiative_id FOREIGN KEY ("initiative_id") REFERENCES public_health_initiatives ("initiative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_initiative_participants_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "immunization_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend entry */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "vaccine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vaccine */,
  "year_start" TEXT /* Start year of the trend period */,
  "year_end" TEXT /* End year of the trend period */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the trend (e.g., increasing, decreasing, stable) */,
  "trend_creator" TEXT /* Creator of the trend */,
  "trend_approver" TEXT /* Approver of the trend */,
  "trend_status" TEXT /* Status of the trend (e.g., draft, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_immunization_trends_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_immunization_trends_vaccine_id FOREIGN KEY ("vaccine_id") REFERENCES vaccines ("vaccine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "role_creator" TEXT /* Creator of the role */,
  "role_approver" TEXT /* Approver of the role */,
  "role_status" TEXT /* Status of the role (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "school_type" TEXT /* Type of the school (e.g., elementary, middle, high) */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the school */,
  "principal_name" TEXT /* Name of the principal */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the school */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the school */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the school */,
  "enrollment_capacity" INTEGER /* Enrollment capacity of the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "grade_level" TEXT /* Grade level of the student */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school */,
  "parent_name" TEXT /* Name of the parent */,
  "parent_contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the parent */,
  "parent_email" TEXT /* Email address of the parent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_immunizations" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "vaccine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vaccine */,
  "dose_number" INTEGER /* Dose number of the vaccine */,
  "administration_date" TEXT /* Date of administration */,
  "administered_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who administered the vaccine */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the vaccine was administered */,
  "side_effects_reported" TEXT /* Side effects reported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id", "vaccine_id", "dose_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_drives" (
  "drive_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination drive */,
  "drive_name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccination drive */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the drive */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the drive */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the drive */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Organizer of the drive */,
  "participants" TEXT /* Participants in the drive */,
  "vaccines_administered" TEXT /* Vaccines administered during the drive */,
  "total_students_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Total number of students vaccinated */,
  "drive_status" TEXT /* Status of the drive (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drive_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_drives_vaccines_administered FOREIGN KEY ("vaccines_administered") REFERENCES vaccines ("vaccine_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccine_suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Contact name at the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "vaccines_supplied" TEXT /* Vaccines supplied by the supplier */,
  "supply_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of supply */,
  "last_supply_date" TEXT /* Date of the last supply */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccine_batches" (
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each batch */,
  "vaccine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vaccine */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number of the vaccine */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the batch */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Production date of the batch */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the batch */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of vaccines in the batch */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Storage conditions for the batch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccine_batches_vaccine_id FOREIGN KEY ("vaccine_id") REFERENCES vaccines ("vaccine_id")
)
